ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "card_name" TEXT /* Name of the card */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of card (e.g., creature, spell, item) */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the card (e.g., common, rare, legendary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the card's abilities and effects */,
  "mana_cost" INTEGER /* Mana cost to play the card */,
  "attack" INTEGER /* Attack power of the card */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health of the card */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the card's image */,
  "flavor_text" TEXT /* Flavor text for the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_tags" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the card (e.g., 'healing', 'damage', 'protection') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id", "tag")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_synergies" (
  "card_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first card */,
  "card_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second card */,
  "synergy_type" TEXT /* Type of synergy (e.g., 'healing', 'damage', 'protection') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id1", "card_id2")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  "mode_type" TEXT /* Type of game mode (e.g., 'ranked', 'unranked') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_data" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deck used in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_data_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_data_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_data_deck_id FOREIGN KEY ("deck_id") REFERENCES decks ("deck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decks" (
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deck */,
  "deck_name" TEXT /* Name of the deck */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who owns the deck */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deck_cards" (
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deck */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the card in the deck */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deck_id", "card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card interaction */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "turn_number" INTEGER /* Turn number when the card was played */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., play, discard, summon) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_interactions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_data ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_interactions_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_interactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model metric */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "model_score_change" REAL /* Mean model score change when a card is removed */,
  "absorpcja_offered" INTEGER /* Number of times Absorpcja+1 is offered in card rewards */,
  "absorpcja_taken" INTEGER /* Number of times Absorpcja+1 is taken by the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_data ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., beginner, experienced) */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the player */,
  "game_count" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card reward */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "reward_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the card is offered */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., 'common', 'rare', 'legendary') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_rewards_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_rewards_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_data ("game_id")
)
